narrative:
Greenhills C (precinct in Hamilton County) has 988 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.0 percentage points.
